Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Further Discovery
Off Calendar Aug-18-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendant Viking Door And Window, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Further Discovery is granted. The objections and preliminary statements made in response to the form and special interrogatories are overruled and ordered stricken. Plaintiff is ordered to respond further within 10 days of notice of this order. The responses to the Request For Production Of Documents are inadequate. Plaintiff is ordered to respond further and to produce within 10 days of notice of this order. The responses were a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $1,090, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
